'''Factryn meat pie''' was a savory [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] delicacy. The [[Pie/Legends|pie]] was made from the meat of the [[factryn]]<ref name="rd" /> [[Species/Legends|species]]<ref name="ff">{{FactFile|12|WOO 1-4|Wookiees}}</ref> and [[Diet/Legends|edible]] by [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and Wookiees.<ref name="rd" /> Around [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]],<ref name="date">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=222689&start=02265#15031920|thread=Books, Comics, & Television VIPs|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-06-14|time=1:08 PM}} states that [[Lumpawaroo/Legends|Lumpawaroo]] was born around [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]. As ''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' establishes that he was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after the [[wedding of Chewbacca and Mallatobuck]], the [[Marriage/Legends|wedding]] must have taken place around [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]].</ref> at the [[Wedding of Chewbacca and Mallatobuck|wedding]] of the Wookiees [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and [[Mallatobuck/Legends|Mallatobuck]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], factryn meat pie was served on a table among other Wookiee delicacies. The Human [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] noted that it was among the safe Wookiee [[Foodstuff/Legends|foods]] that were not too spicy for Human consumption.<ref name="rd" />

==Behind the scenes==
Factryn meat pies appeared in the [[1997]] novel ''[[Rebel Dawn]]'', written by [[A. C. Crispin]] as the third novel in [[The Han Solo Trilogy (hardcover)|''The Han Solo Trilogy'']].<ref name="rd" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
